+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-152
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24T14:06:27+03:00
+RELATED_FILES:
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project — `scenes` changed from `[]` to exactly one relative path `"scenes/main.rge-scene"`.
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene — new minimal schema-load-only Scene fixture (version `"0.1.0"`, name `"main"`, empty entities, empty root_entities).
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs — updated positive project assertion to require the one scene path, resolves and parses the referenced `.rge-scene`, asserts schema facts only, and adds a scene deliberate-break parse-failure test alongside the existing project one.
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_TASK_2026-05-24_13-54-28+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`: changed the `scenes` list from `[]` to exactly `["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`. The existing `version`, `name`, `description`, `target_tiers`, and empty `plugins` are unchanged.
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` (new): minimal valid `rge_data::Scene` RON — `version: "0.1.0"`, `name: "main"`, `entities: []`, `root_entities: []`. No entity, component, relation, transform, camera, light, mesh, material, prefab, asset, plugin, render-output, or runtime content.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_manifest_parses_as_project`: positive project assertion now expects `project.scenes` to equal `vec![ScenePath("scenes/main.rge-scene".to_string())]` instead of being empty. All other project schema assertions (version `V0_1_0`, name `"simple-scene"`, non-empty description, `target_tiers == [Desktop]`, empty `plugins`) are preserved verbatim.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_manifest_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse`: retained as the project deliberate-break negative variant. The substring used for the in-memory removal is now `"    name: \"simple-scene\","` (without an explicit trailing `\n`) so the match is robust to LF or CRLF working-tree line endings on this Windows host (where `core.autocrlf=true` converts the LF-in-index manifest to CRLF on disk). The mutation still strips the required `name` field; parsing the mutated text as `Project` is still asserted to fail.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_referenced_scene_parses_as_scene` (new): resolves the scene path from `Project.scenes[0]` relative to the parsed project manifest directory (no hard-coded fixture lookup), reads and parses the referenced `.rge-scene` as `rge_data::Scene`, then asserts only schema facts: `scene.version == SchemaVersion::V0_1_0`, `scene.name == "main"`, `scene.entities` empty, `scene.root_entities` empty.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_referenced_scene_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse` (new): scene deliberate-break negative variant. Mutates the scene fixture text in memory by removing `"    name: \"main\","` and asserts parsing the mutated text as `rge_data::Scene` fails.
+
+A small helper `read_scene_referenced_by(project, manifest_path)` was added in the same test file to keep the resolve-and-read logic out of both new test bodies. `Scene` and `ScenePath` are pulled in from the existing public `rge_data::` re-exports — no production schema, loader, public API, or Cargo file was touched.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. No README, status doc, doctrine, planning doc, ADR, schema doc, workflow, script, or handoff-protocol doc was edited.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`: one-line change, `scenes: []` -> `scenes: ["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`. Header, name, description, target tiers, and plugins are byte-identical.
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`: 6-line RON, identical-in-shape to the existing `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_scene.rge-scene` but with `name: "main"` and empty `entities` / `root_entities`. No runtime or renderer-only fields.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`: module doc updated to describe the project-to-scene schema-load shape; imports extended to `Scene, ScenePath`; positive project assertion strengthened; one helper added; two new tests added; existing project negative test retained with a CRLF-robust required-line substring.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+Commands shown were run from `A:\RCAD\RGE` in PowerShell with `A:\RustCache\cargo\bin` prepended to `PATH` (matching `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`).
+
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (before any edit) -> exit 0, no output (clean tracked tree).
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema` -> exit 0. Result: `4 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out`. Tests: `simple_scene_manifest_parses_as_project`, `simple_scene_manifest_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse`, `simple_scene_referenced_scene_parses_as_scene`, `simple_scene_referenced_scene_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse`.
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` -> exit 0. All 7 steps green: `cargo +nightly fmt --check`, `architecture lints`, `architecture-lint test suite`, `cargo deny check`, `cargo test --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo test --workspace --doc`, `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`. Final line: `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (after implementation, after the EXEC packet was scaffolded) -> exit 0, output:
+  ```
+   M crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+   M golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+  ```
+  Including untracked entries (`git status --short`), the additional items are this dispatch's own packet artifacts and the new scene fixture directory:
+  ```
+   M crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+   M golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+  ?? ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_TASK_2026-05-24_13-54-28+0300.md
+  ?? ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_TASK_2026-05-24_13-54-28+0300.meta.json
+  ?? golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/
+  ?? ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_2026-05-24_14-06-27+0300.md
+  ```
+  The two tracked modifications and the one new scene fixture file are exactly the three source-facing files allowed by the TASK packet. The two `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_TASK_*` files are this dispatch's TASK packet and sidecar (pre-existing untracked at session start). The `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_*` file is this report. No `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` artifact was created by this session.
+
+No pre-existing tracked changes were visible before any edit, so nothing unrelated was carried over, cleaned, or reverted.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope.
+
+The only non-functional adjustment worth flagging for the Reviewer: in the existing project deliberate-break test the `required_line` substring was trimmed of its trailing `\n` (now `"    name: \"simple-scene\","`). This was done solely to keep the in-memory mutation match robust to CRLF working-tree line endings on this Windows host (`git config core.autocrlf` is `true`, so the LF-in-index `.rge-project` is materialised as CRLF on disk, and the prior `,\n` substring did not match). The behavioural contract is unchanged: the substring is still a unique required-line marker; removing it strips the `name` field; parsing the mutated text as `Project` is still asserted to fail. The same robustness is mirrored in the new scene negative test. This is inside the allowed edit surface for `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- None blocking. The CRLF-robust required-line substring noted above is the only judgement call; if a stricter LF-only contract is preferred, the line endings of the tracked `.rge-project` would need to be force-normalised to LF via `.gitattributes`, which is outside this dispatch's allowed edit surface and would need a fresh Planner packet.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files modified: `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`, `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`.
+- Untracked items: `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` (the new fixture this dispatch is adding), `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_TASK_2026-05-24_13-54-28+0300.md` and matching `.meta.json` (this dispatch's TASK packet, present at session start), `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_2026-05-24_14-06-27+0300.md` (this report).
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-152`.
+- Last commit: `628328c chore(dispatch): seed task #34 simple-scene scene fixture schema test`.
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-152
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,145 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-152
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_13-54-28+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_*.meta.json
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md
+- GitHub issue #152
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Fix GitHub issue #152 by adding the smallest schema-load-only scene fixture for the existing golden simple-scene project. The project manifest must reference exactly one relative scene path, the `rge-data` integration test must resolve that path from the parsed `Project`, parse the referenced file as `rge_data::Scene`, and assert only schema facts. The dispatch must stay within project-to-scene schema loading under `rge-data` tests and must not expand into runtime, renderer, asset, cook, screenshot, Cargo, workflow, script, or doctrine work.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Any file under `crates/rge-data/src/**` or any other production source directory.
+- Any file under `crates/rge-data/tests/**` other than `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- Any file under `golden-projects/**` other than `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` and the new fixture file `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`.
+- Any existing scene, prefab, asset, generated asset, renderer comparison artifact, cook output, screenshot baseline, typed component bridging file, README, status document, doctrine document, planning document, ADR, schema file, script, workflow, or Cargo file.
+- Renderer, GPU, asset-store, cook, editor runtime, load+tick, shell, kernel, marketplace, generated code, or CI workflow surfaces.
+- Any existing handoff packet or existing dispatch log, including this TASK packet after execution begins.
+- Any GitHub issue, label, PR, branch, review, comment, commit, remote state, or queue metadata except the queue runner's normal issue lifecycle for this dispatch.
+
+### MAY add new files
+- Exactly one source-facing fixture file: `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`.
+- Exactly one execution report matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_*.md`.
+- The matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_EXEC_*.meta.json` sidecar only if `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` creates it while finalizing the EXEC report.
+- This dispatch's own queue-runner log under `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` only if the queue runner creates it as part of normal dispatch operation.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any source-facing file other than `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`.
+- Any additional scene fixture, prefab fixture, asset fixture, generated asset, screenshot baseline, renderer comparison artifact, cook output, Cargo file, dependency file, schema, script, workflow, architecture lint, TASK packet, REVIEW packet, CLOSEOUT packet, issue note, design document, doctrine document, status document, or planning document.
+- Any handoff packet other than this dispatch's single `ISSUE-152_EXEC_*.md` report and optional matching `.meta.json` sidecar.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` is updated so `scenes` changes from `[]` to exactly one relative scene path: `"scenes/main.rge-scene"`.
+- Exactly one new scene fixture exists at `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`.
+- The new `.rge-scene` fixture is a minimal valid `rge_data::Scene` value with schema version `0.1.0`, scene name `main`, no entities, and no root entities.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` continues to read the real `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` file and parse it as `rge_data::Project`.
+- The positive project assertions are revised so `Project.scenes` is exactly one `ScenePath("scenes/main.rge-scene")` instead of empty.
+- The test resolves the scene file path from the parsed `Project.scenes[0]`, relative to the project manifest directory, then reads and parses that file as `rge_data::Scene`.
+- The positive scene assertions are schema facts only: scene version, scene name, empty entities, and empty root entities.
+- The existing project deliberate-break parse-failure test remains.
+- A scene deliberate-break parse-failure test is added or retained by mutating the scene fixture text in memory and asserting parsing the mutated text as `rge_data::Scene` fails.
+- One `EXECUTION_REPORT` packet documents the implementation, before and after worktree status, verification commands, exact exit codes, and any pre-existing tracked changes.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- The only source-facing repository changes are:
+  - `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+  - `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`
+  - `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`
+- The simple-scene project manifest keeps the existing schema version, name, description, target tiers, and empty plugins, and changes only the scene list from empty to exactly `["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`.
+- The scene path stored in the project is relative, project-root-relative, and contains no absolute path, drive prefix, parent-directory traversal, backslash-only Windows path, glob, or generated-output path.
+- The new scene fixture parses as `rge_data::Scene` without any production schema or loader changes.
+- The new scene fixture contains no runtime-only fields and no renderer, GPU, asset-store, cook, screenshot, typed component bridging, load+tick, editor runtime, or generated data assumptions.
+- The integration test resolves the referenced scene path from the parsed `Project`, not from an unrelated hard-coded fixture lookup.
+- The integration test parses the referenced `.rge-scene` as `rge_data::Scene` and asserts only schema facts.
+- The integration test keeps both deliberate-break negative variants: one for the project manifest and one for the scene fixture.
+- No production source, Cargo file, workflow, script, schema, doctrine, status document, planning document, ADR, README, or handoff-protocol document is edited.
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema` exits 0.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exits 0.
+- The final tracked diff is limited to the three source-facing files listed above, this dispatch's own `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-152_*` packet artifacts, and this dispatch's own `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` artifact if the queue runner creates one.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This is not a load+tick, editor-runtime, renderer, GPU, asset-store, cook, screenshot, typed component bridge, or generated-output task.
+- Do not instantiate runtime worlds, editor shells, renderer contexts, GPU contexts, asset stores, cook pipelines, screenshot comparison tools, or typed component bridges.
+- Do not add camera, light, transform, mesh, material, gameplay, hierarchy, prefab, plugin, asset, or render-output content to the scene fixture.
+- Do not add assertions about runtime behavior, entity/component semantics, camera/light/transform content, render output, screenshots, asset loading, cook output, plugin loading, or future simple-scene content.
+- Do not modify `rge-data` production schema, serde attributes, migrations, loaders, examples, existing fixtures outside the named golden fixture, or public API.
+- Do not edit Cargo manifests, add dependencies, or regenerate Cargo metadata.
+- Do not edit workflows, scripts, doctrine, status docs, planning docs, ADRs, README files, or handoff protocol docs.
+- Do not commit, push, open a PR, create or edit GitHub issues, change labels, or write follow-up packets.
+
